export default function AboutPage() { return (
About The Project

Healthcare guidance powered by a full-stack AI-enabled platform.

The Health Care Assistant Chatbot is designed to provide a complete digital health support experience, connecting patients, AI-driven healthcare tools, and supervisory administration in one unified system.

Objectives

Support early triage, streamline healthcare workflows, improve accessibility, and give administrators system-wide visibility.

Technologies

React.js, Django REST Framework, MySQL, Gemini API, OpenAI API, Web Speech API, SMTP email services, and PDF extraction.

Healthcare Purpose

The chatbot assists with symptoms, appointments, medication tracking, reports, and user guidance while admins monitor accuracy and activity.

); }
